use_cases: Selecting appointment dates in healthcare scheduling applications
Choosing delivery or booking dates in e-commerce checkout flows
Setting event or deadline dates in project management tools
Picking inspection or closing dates in real estate platforms
Recording transaction or billing dates in financial dashboards
ai_summary: A clean, accessible date picker component built with Ark UI featuring a trigger input, month/year selectors, and a calendar grid popup. Includes dark mode support, clear functionality, and focus states. Designed for universal use across SaaS, e-commerce, healthcare, and financial applications requiring date selection.
